```{=html}
  </p>
```

```{r divulgacao-dinamica}
library(htmltools)
library(rvest)
library(xml2)

get_meta_content <- function(doc, selectors) {
  for (selector in selectors) {
    value <- doc |>
      html_element(selector) |>
      html_attr("content")

    if (!is.na(value) && nzchar(trimws(value))) {
      return(trimws(value))
    }
  }

  ""
}

fetch_link_preview <- function(url) {
  empty <- list(
    titulo = "",
    descricao = "",
    imagem = ""
  )

  if (!nz(url) || url == "#") return(empty)

  tryCatch({
    doc <- read_html(url)

    titulo <- get_meta_content(
      doc,
      c(
        "meta[property='og:title']",
        "meta[name='twitter:title']"
      )
    )

    if (!nz(titulo)) {
      titulo <- doc |>
        html_element("title") |>
        html_text2()
    }

    descricao <- get_meta_content(
      doc,
      c(
        "meta[property='og:description']",
        "meta[name='twitter:description']",
        "meta[name='description']"
      )
    )

    imagem <- get_meta_content(
      doc,
      c(
        "meta[property='og:image']",
        "meta[property='og:image:secure_url']",
        "meta[name='twitter:image']"
      )
    )

    if (nz(imagem)) {
      imagem <- xml2::url_absolute(imagem, url)
    }

    list(
      titulo = ifelse(is.na(titulo), "", titulo),
      descricao = ifelse(is.na(descricao), "", descricao),
      imagem = ifelse(is.na(imagem), "", imagem)
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    empty
  })
}

insta <- read_optional_csv(file.path("_input_data", "divulgacao_instagram.csv"))
news <- read_optional_csv(file.path("_input_data", "divulgacao_reportagens.csv"))

make_media_items <- function(data, kind = c("instagram", "reportagem")) {
  kind <- match.arg(kind)

  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    arquivo <- if (kind == "instagram") {
      "_input_data/divulgacao_instagram.csv"
    } else {
      "_input_data/divulgacao_reportagens.csv"
    }

    return(
      tags$div(
        class = "empty-media",
        paste0("Nenhum item encontrado em ", arquivo, ". Ao adicionar linhas nesse CSV e renderizar o site novamente, os cards aparecerão automaticamente aqui.")
      )
    )
  }
  
  if (nrow(data) > 2) {
  data <- utils::tail(data, 2)
}
data <- data[rev(seq_len(nrow(data))), , drop = FALSE]

  titulo <- col_or(data, c("titulo", "título", "title", "post"), "Sem título")
  url <- col_or(data, c("url", "link", "href"), "#")
  data_item <- col_or(data, c("data", "date", "ano"), "")
  imagem <- col_or(data, c("imagem", "image", "thumb", "thumbnail", "capa"), "")
  descricao <- col_or(data, c("descricao", "descrição", "resumo", "caption", "texto"), "")
  veiculo <- col_or(data, c("veiculo", "veículo", "fonte", "source"), "")

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(data))) {
  preview <- fetch_link_preview(url[i])

  if (!nz(titulo[i]) || titulo[i] == "Sem título") {
    titulo[i] <- preview$titulo
  }

  if (!nz(descricao[i])) {
    descricao[i] <- preview$descricao
  }

  if (!nz(imagem[i])) {
    imagem[i] <- preview$imagem
  }
}
  
  tags$div(
    class = "media-grid",
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(data)), function(i) {
      thumb <- if (nz(imagem[i])) {
        tags$div(class = "media-thumb", tags$img(src = imagem[i], alt = titulo[i], loading = "lazy"))
      } else {
        tags$div(class = "media-thumb", ifelse(kind == "instagram", "Instagram", "Reportagem"))
      }

      label <- if (kind == "instagram") {
        "Post"
      } else if (nz(veiculo[i])) {
        veiculo[i]
      } else {
        "Matéria"
      }

      tags$article(
        class = paste("media-item", paste0("media-item-", kind)),
        thumb,
        tags$div(
          class = "media-body",
          tags$div(class = "media-date", paste(label, ifelse(nz(data_item[i]), paste("·", data_item[i]), ""))),
          tags$h4(titulo[i]),
          if (nz(descricao[i])) tags$p(descricao[i]),
          tags$a(
            class = "media-link",
            href = url[i],
            target = "_blank",
            rel = "noopener",
            ifelse(kind == "instagram", "Ver no Instagram →", "Ler reportagem →")
          )
        )
      )
    })
  )
}

tagList(
  tags$div(
    class = "media-layout",
    tags$div(
      class = "media-panel",
      tags$div(
        class = "media-panel-header",
        tags$h3("Instagram do projeto"),
        tags$span(class = "media-panel-label", "Social")
      ),
      make_media_items(insta, "instagram")
    ),
    tags$div(
      class = "media-panel",
      tags$div(
        class = "media-panel-header",
        tags$h3("Reportagens e notícias"),
        tags$span(class = "media-panel-label", "Imprensa")
      ),
      make_media_items(news, "reportagem")
    )
  )
)
```

```{=html}
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section id="pesquisadores-responsaveis" class="content-card researchers-section">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2>Rede de coordenação científica</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="researchers-layout">
    <div class="researchers-copy">
      <div class="researchers-kicker">Rede de coordenação científica</div>

      <p class="lead researchers-lead">
        O projeto é coordenado por uma rede multidisciplinar vinculada a instituições amazônicas, centros de pesquisa de outros estados brasileiros e parceiros do Reino Unido.
      </p>

      <p>
        A rede combina taxonomia, sistemática, bioinformática, micologia, briologia, florística, química de solos, comunicação científica, audiovisual e colaboração com parataxonomistas e representantes indígenas.
      </p>

      <div class="researchers-summary">
        <div>
          <span class="researchers-number">30</span>
          <span class="researchers-label">instituições articuladas</span>
        </div>

        <div>
          <span class="researchers-number">66</span>
          <span class="researchers-label">pesquisadores, estudantes e equipe técnica</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-actions researchers-actions">
        <a class="btn-main" href="team/">Conhecer a equipe completa</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="researchers-panel">
      <div class="researchers-panel-header">
        <h3></h3>
      </div>

      <div class="researchers-list">
        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPEAM</span>
          <h4>Charles Zartman</h4>
          <p>Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia — INPA</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPERJ</span>
          <h4>Domingos Cardoso</h4>
          <p>Jardim Botânico do Rio de Janeiro — JBRJ</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">UKRI</span>
          <h4>Sandra Diane Knapp</h4>
          <p>Natural History Museum</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPESPA</span>
          <h4>Anna Luiza Ilkiu-Borges</h4>
          <p>Museu Paraense Emílio Goeldi — MPEG</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FACEPE</span>
          <h4>Clistenes Williams Araújo do Nascimento</h4>
          <p>Universidade Federal Rural de Pernambuco — UFRPE</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPEMA</span>
          <h4>Dirce Komura</h4>
          <p>Instituto Federal do Maranhão — IFMA</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPESP</span>
          <h4>Denilson Fernandes Peralta</h4>
          <p>Instituto de Pesquisas Ambientais — IPA</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPESQ</span>
          <h4>Felipe Wartchow</h4>
          <p>Universidade Federal da Paraíba — UFPB</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPDF</span>
          <h4>Micheline Carvalho-Silva</h4>
          <p>Universidade de Brasília — UnB</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===== OVERRIDE FINAL — #divulgacao sem escape horizontal =====
   Este bloco é o último style do documento e vence todos os conflitos
   de cascata. Usa 100% (largura do contêiner pai) em vez de 100vw
   (largura da viewport), evitando o escape causado pela barra de rolagem. */

#divulgacao.content-card {
  position: relative !important;
  left: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: none !important;
  width: min(1320px, calc(100% - 1.5rem)) !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - 1.5rem) !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  padding-left: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 2.2rem) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 2.2rem) !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}

#divulgacao,
#divulgacao * {
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

#divulgacao .section-title,
#divulgacao .lead,
#divulgacao .media-layout,
#divulgacao .media-panel,
#divulgacao .media-grid,
#divulgacao .media-item,
#divulgacao .media-body,
#divulgacao .media-thumb {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  #divulgacao.content-card {
    width: calc(100% - 1rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100% - 1rem) !important;
  }
  #divulgacao .media-panel {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  #divulgacao .media-grid {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  }
  #divulgacao .media-item {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 38%) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  #divulgacao.content-card {
    width: calc(100% - 0.75rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100% - 0.75rem) !important;
    padding-left: 0.9rem !important;
    padding-right: 0.9rem !important;
  }
  #divulgacao .media-panel,
  #divulgacao .media-item {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  }
  #divulgacao .media-thumb {
    height: 220px !important;
    min-height: 220px !important;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* =====================================================================
   FIX DIVULGAÇÃO — notebook pequeno / tela em 100%
   Adicione este bloco NO FINAL do arquivo index.qmd (dentro de <style>)
   ou como último <style> do documento.
   ===================================================================== */

/* Reset: garante que nenhuma regra anterior force layout horizontal */
#divulgacao.content-card {
  position: relative !important;
  left: auto !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: none !important;
  width: min(1260px, calc(100% - 1.5rem)) !important;
  max-width: calc(100% - 1.5rem) !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
  padding: clamp(1.2rem, 2.5vw, 2.2rem) !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}

#divulgacao,
#divulgacao * {
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}

/* Layout geral: dois painéis empilhados */
#divulgacao .media-layout {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.4rem) !important;
  align-items: start !important;
}

/* Cada painel: header + grid de cards empilhados */
#divulgacao .media-panel {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  gap: 0.9rem !important;
  padding: clamp(0.9rem, 1.8vw, 1.2rem) !important;
  border-radius: 22px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.98), rgba(246,241,232,0.82)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.24) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.07) !important;
  height: 100% !important;
}

/* Header do painel: horizontal compacto */
#divulgacao .media-panel-header {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: row !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  gap: 0.75rem !important;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem !important;
  border-radius: 16px !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.96), rgba(98,106,56,0.92)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png") !important;
  background-size: cover !important;
  min-height: auto !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel-header::after {
  display: none !important;
  content: none !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel h3 {
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
  font-size: 0.74rem !important;
  line-height: 1.3 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  max-width: none !important;
}

/* Grid de cards: sempre 1 coluna dentro de cada painel */
#divulgacao .media-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  gap: 0.85rem !important;
}

/* Card individual: thumb em cima, body embaixo — SEM layout lateral */
#divulgacao .media-item {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.98) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.055) !important;
  transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-item:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10) !important;
}

/* Thumb: altura fixa, largura total */
#divulgacao .media-thumb {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: clamp(200px, 22vw, 280px) !important;
  min-height: 200px !important;
  flex-shrink: 0 !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.94), rgba(98,106,56,0.78)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png") !important;
  background-size: cover !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.82) !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: 0.68rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-thumb img {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
  display: block !important;
}

/* Body: texto com espaço generoso */
#divulgacao .media-body {
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem 1.15rem !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  flex: 1 !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-date {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: 0.68rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  color: var(--red, #A93632) !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem !important;
  white-space: normal !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-body h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem !important;
  font-size: 1rem !important;
  line-height: 1.28 !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  color: #171717 !important;
  word-break: normal !important;
  overflow-wrap: normal !important;
  hyphens: none !important;
  display: -webkit-box !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3 !important;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-body p {
  margin: 0 0 0.8rem !important;
  font-size: 0.86rem !important;
  line-height: 1.5 !important;
  color: #675F55 !important;
  word-break: normal !important;
  overflow-wrap: normal !important;
  hyphens: none !important;
  display: -webkit-box !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3 !important;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-link {
  margin-top: auto !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: 0.68rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  color: var(--red, #A93632) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* ── Responsivo ── */

/* Tablet / janela estreita: empilha os dois painéis */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  #divulgacao .media-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }
}

/* Thumb menor em mobile */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  #divulgacao.content-card {
    padding: 1rem 0.9rem !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-thumb {
    height: 210px !important;
    min-height: 210px !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-panel {
    border-radius: 18px !important;
  }
}
</style>
```
